title: Class 10 Board exam results: Tamil Nadu records 94.3% pass rate
content: While Pudukottai topped the State, with a pass percentage of 97.57%, Sivaganga came second, with 97.54%, followed by Thanjavur, at 97.41%

title: G. Sudhakaran sworn in as Kerala Assembly Pro Tem Speaker
content: Appointment of Sudhakaran, who won from Ambalappuzha constituency with UDF backing after a high-profile rebellion against his former party, CPI(M), adheres to established parliamentary convention of designating the senior-most member of the House to the temporary post

title: ‘No place for personal enmity in politics’, says G. Sudhakaran on swearing in former Kerala CM Pinarayi as MLA
content: Sudhakaran, who has been sworn in as Pro Tem Speaker of Kerala Assembly, says he sees ‘no difference’ between Pinarayi Vijayan and any other MLA to whom he will be administering the oath of office on Thursday

title: Nellore emerging as industrial hub with ₹10,000 crore investment: Chandrababu Naidu
content: Naidu announces roads connecting 25 fishing villages at a cost of ₹6.27 crore, desilting of North Buckingham Canal with ₹6.19 crore; seven industries to invest ₹10,000 crore in the district

title: One-day nationwide chemists' strike begins on mixed note
content: AIOCD General Secretary Rajiv Singhal reiterated that AIOCD is protesting the GSR 817 and GSR 220 notifications, as these are effectively regularising online pharmacies.

title: Bandh call: Pharmacies to stay open on May 20, but chemists to show support by sporting black badges and ribbons
content: “Many online portals are announcing excessive discounts even on life-saving medicines and attracting the public through social media and advertisements; this is sending the wrong message,” the MCDRCA said

title: PM Modi meets Italian PM Meloni, visits Colosseum | Live
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi receives a ceremonial welcome as he lands in Rome, Italy, on the last leg of his five-nation visit

title: Dairy farmers ask government to hike price of Aavin milk
content: Tamil Nadu Milk Producers Welfare Association general secretary M.G. Rajendran said the TVK, in its election manifesto, had promised ₹44 per litre of milk

title: Shyam Metalics announces ₹20,000 crore investment push in Bengal
content: Company plans railway manufacturing unit in Kharagpur, expansion of workforce to 45,000; seeks easier land policy and faster industrial growth under new government

title: Tambaram residents miffed with ‘silent’ water charges hike and deposit burden
content: Tambaram residents challenge new water tariff as well as deposits and decry the lack of a consultation prior to the revision of the charges

title: Maharashtra Govt signs MoUs of ₹6.5 lakh crore to generate 25,400 MW of nuclear power
content: Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis said, “The investment coming to the State in the clean energy generation sector will strengthen the country to become an energy-rich nation”

title: Farmers urge Centre to supply required quantity of fertilisers to Karnataka
content: Karnataka’s Agriculture Minister N. Chaluvarayaswamy had said that the State will face a shortage of 38,000 metric tonnes of fertiliser

title: Maharashtra completes documentation of over 23,000 wetlands
content: According to the Maharashtra wetlands dashboard maintained by the NCSCM data, Chattrapati Sambhaji Nagar and Nagpur division has the highest wetlands in Maharashtra, with 5,196 and 5,086 wetlands respectively

title: KKRDB approves action plan for ₹5,000 crore allocation in Karnataka budget
content: Of the ₹5,000 crore allocation, the Board decided to earmark ₹2,900 crore for micro and macro development projects, with 70% of the amount to be spent on micro-level works, and 30% on major infrastructure and development projects

title: NEET paper leak: CBI searches houses of three students in Nagpur, Chandrapur
content: A team from New Delhi, along with CBI personnel in Nagpur, raided the houses of two students from Nagpur and one student from Brahmapuri taluka in Chandrapur district

title: How Karunanidhi successfully headed a minority government for five years
content: The last time Tamil Nadu witnessed a coalition government was in 1952; however, leaders of the Dravidian parties largely steered clear of the idea thereafter

title: Kochi P&T Apartment owners issue ultimatum threatening to lay siege to GCDA office over persistent leakage
content: Residents have been protesting against the persistent leakage since 78 families moved in in January 2024. They have also raised concerns about cracks and an alleged tilt in the buildings

title: Lokayukta raids in PMAY scam; officials, contractor accused of ₹23.35 crore fraud in Karnataka
content: According to the complaint, large-scale irregularities were allegedly committed in PMAY housing projects executed in the notified slum areas of Ramdurg town in Belagavi district

title: Two sub-registrars likely to be suspended as dead man signs not one but two land deals in Belagavi district
content: Two land deals, worth crores of rupees, were registered in the name of Digambar Shripad Kulkarni who had passed away on April 9, 1987

title: Kerala CM V.D. Satheesan’s mention of caste surname while taking oath invites criticism from Congress leader
content: Congress leader Jinto John says ‘a Congress that doesn’t carry the baggage of caste is a lot more inclusive’

title: TVK MLA Kanimozhi’s meeting with Coimbatore Corporation officials in ‘astrology office’ draws ire
content: Kanimozhi, who claims to have an honorary doctorate in astrology, told The Hindu the Corporation officials visited her voluntarily and she did not ask them to visit her

title: Jharia coal fires may burn hotter, emit more greenhouse gases than thought
content: While industrial emissions are subject to rigorous monitoring, fugitive emissions from uncontrolled coal fires like in Jharia are rarely part of global greenhouse gas audits

title: Indian diplomat found dead inside mission in Bangladesh's Chattogram
content: Naren Dhar, an Assistant Protocol Officer at the Indian mission, was found in front of a bathroom door early in the morning on the second floor of the old visa centre building of the diplomatic mission

title: Indian Navy awards ADITI 3.0 contract for HPM system to Tonbo Imaging
content: High Power Microwave systems represent a strategically significant directed-energy capability and are considered a strategic asset owned by only a limited number of countries today, Tonbo Imaging said

title: OCI status of foreigners who  voted in Tamil Nadu Assembly election comes under scrutiny
content: The number of foreigners of Indian origin who voted in a fraudulent manner has increased to 30. Their declaration while applying for the OCI card that they had surrendered their voter identity cards or deleted their names from the electoral rolls will be treated as a false declaration and action will taken under law, sources say

title: J&K minister Javed Rana accuses L-G of ‘targeted demolitions against Gujjars, Bakarwals’ in Jammu, ‘will not be silent spectators’
content: He said the matter will be taken up with Chief Minister Omar Abdullah “to demand an immediate halt, an institutional inquiry against the responsible officers and officials, and full rehabilitation for the affected families”

title: India, Vietnam deepen defence cooperation with focus on maritime security
content: Both countries agreed to expand cooperation through regular dialogues, joint military exercises and exchange programmes between their armed forces

title: From ‘virus’ to ‘tsunami’: How outgoing Chief Ministers, leaders of Tamil Nadu viewed election results since 1967
content: In a recent comment on the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam winning the 2026 Tamil Nadu elections, DMK president M.K. Stalin described the victory as a “new and attractive tsunami of illusion”

title: Rubio to attend NATO talks, pay first visit to India
content: The State Department confirmed that Marco Rubio would participate on Friday (May 22, 2026) in talks among NATO Foreign Ministers in Helsingborg, Sweden, which will prepare for a NATO summit in Turkey in July

title: Modi and Meloni outline road map for India-Italy strategic partnership
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni joint op-ed talks about emerging “Indo-Mediterranean” corridor and pushes for €20-billion bilateral trade target by 2029.

title: A.P. Chief Minister advises Kavali MLA to improve performance of 13 departments
content: Chandrababu Naidu directs the officials of APSRTC, Endowments and Rural Water Supply departments to work diligently and meet the expectations of the people

title: PM Modi lands in Rome, to meet Italian PM Meloni
content: Narendra Modi was received at the airport by Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation Antonio Tajani

title: Commitment to democracy makes India, Nordic nations natural partners: Modi
content: India and Nordic countries announce ‘Green Tech and innovation Strategic Partnership’ with focus on sustainable energy and maritime research; joint statement condemns Pahalgam terror attack

title: Rape accused gets grand welcome in Ghaziabad, opposition hit out over viral video
content: In the videos, the accused is seen being greeted with flower garlands and carried on the shoulders of supporters during a celebratory procession

title: Supreme Court notice on plea that U.P. Police played ‘agent provocateur’ in Noida workers’ violence
content: Rather than fulfilling its role as a welfare state, the petition says Uttar Pradesh had used its police officers to covertly become part of WhatsApp groups of the protestors; the entire prosecution was vitiated when the investigating agency itself acted as the ‘architect of the unrest’, it says

title: PM Modi skips questions from press; Norwegian PM Store says ‘different traditions’
content: MEA Secretary (West) Sibi George defends policy, says India’s constitution guarantees press freedoms, democracy and human rights

title: Examining the Tadmetla encounter inquiry
content: The investigation of grave offences, particularly involving banned organisations such as the CPI (Maoist), requires special skills

title: Government misleading people on inflation, fuel shortage: Ashok Gehlot
content: Ashok Gehlot said the ruling Bharatiya Janata Party was engrossed in elections during the last three months despite Congress leader Rahul Gandhi having warned that a “storm of inflation” was coming to the country

title: Gulf conflict pushes up fertiliser prices, but supply will stay steady: Jakhar
content: Sunil Jakhar urged farmers to use fertilisers judiciously, in line with recommendations of agricultural universities to avoid wastage and protect soil health

title: Bihar CM Samrat Choudhary launches Sahyog Shivir to resolve people’s grievances
content: Issues to be resolved at the camp include matters relating to ration, pension, housing, MGNREGA, land disputes, mutation, demarcation, caste certificates, income certificates, residential certificates, electricity, water, roads, education, and health.

title: High drama in Barmer as MLA douses himself in petrol during protest
content: Ravindra Singh Bhati was taken inside the Collectorate for talks with the senior officers to resolve the issue, while the premises were placed under heavy police deployment

title: At the Congress’ convention, Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah attacks BJP and PM Narendra Modi
content: Siddaramaiah’s attack on the BJP seemed to counter Prime Minister Narendra Modi, who, during his visit to Bengaluru, had ridiculed the State government and attacked the Congress

title: ‘Alarming rise’ in crimes against women in Bihar since ‘new emperor’ took oath, says Tejashwi Yadav
content: The RJD leader released a list of 50 incidents of crimes reported in the State within one month since BJP leader Samrat Choudhary took oath as Chief Minister on April 15

title: Blunt injuries on body, hanging with gymnastic ring rope: What Twisha Sharma’s autopsy revealed
content: A post-mortem revealed Twisha Sharma died from hanging, but also showed blunt-force injuries. Her family alleges harassment, while the accused's mother claims Twisha sought an abortion. Police are actively searching for the prime accused, Samarth Singh, with a reward offered for information.

title: Car ride, dinner, visit to iconic Colosseum: 'Melodi' moments from Rome ahead of talks
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi met Italian counterpart Giorgia Meloni for dinner and a walk through the Colosseum upon his arrival in Rome. The leaders exchanged perspectives on boosting India-Italy friendship, with their discussions taking on a relaxed tone against the historic backdrop. Modi also received a warm welcome from the Indian diaspora in Italy.

title: Left vs BJP in Kerala over full 'Vande Mataram' recital at Satheesan's oath ceremony
content: A political controversy has ignited in Kerala following the full recitation of 'Vande Mataram' at a new cabinet's oath-taking. The CPI(M) criticizes the move, citing historical precedents and concerns for pluralism. The BJP retorts, accusing the CPI(M) of insulting the national song and appeasing certain groups. A similar protocol dispute occurred in Tamil Nadu over song sequencing.

title: Youngest and fastest ever! Vaibhav Sooryavanshi rewrites IPL history again
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continues his sensational IPL 2026 run, smashing 93 off 38 balls against LSG. He became the youngest to 500 runs and set a new strike rate record. Sooryavanshi also broke the Indian six-hitting record for a season, reaching 53. His explosive innings powered Rajasthan's successful chase of 221.

title: 'Forced to eat beef': Woman alleges ‘love jihad’, claims she was barred from Hindu worship
content: A 27-year-old Hindu woman in Ulhasnagar has accused Imran Sheikh of 'love jihad', alleging he concealed his Muslim identity to marry her and subsequently forced her to adopt Islamic customs. Sheikh and two of his brothers have been arrested for cheating and hurting religious sentiments.

title: Meta layoffs: 4am email ‘horror’ starts from Singapore
content: Meta Platforms has initiated global layoffs, with Singapore employees receiving termination notices early Wednesday. Thousands worldwide are affected as the company restructures, prioritizing AI.  Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is making AI the top focus, investing heavily, while employees and investors voice concerns over data privacy and massive AI expenditure.

title: TMC candidate Jahangir Khan's name will remain on EVMs - here's why
content: Trinamool Congress's Falta candidate, Jahangir Khan, announced he would not contest the May 21 repoll, citing the need for Falta's peace and development. This decision came after widespread electoral malpractice led to the repoll. The TMC stated Khan's withdrawal was a personal choice, while the BJP dismissed it as a tactic due to lack of support.

title: Pakistan's claim of hitting 2 Indian airbases falls apart: The locations don't exist
content: Pakistan has made a bizarre claim of hitting two non-existent airbases, Rajouri and Mamun, during their counter-action "Operation Bunyan Ul Marsoos." This follows India's strong retaliatory action last year, where all Pakistani missiles and drone swarms were intercepted and destroyed by India's air defence.

title: ‘Everyone knows that, but...’: Rishabh Pant drops F-bomb after LSG defeat in Jaipur
content: Lucknow Super Giants captain Rishabh Pant expressed frustration after his team's ninth loss.  He stated the team is still good despite missing the playoffs.  LSG lost to Rajasthan Royals after failing to defend a high score.  Pant acknowledged the need for experience in crucial moments.  He also defended tactical decisions made during the match.

title: AWS CEO just told engineers: We will need tons and tons of software developers
content: AWS CEO Matt Garman reassures that AI won't eliminate software engineers but will transform their roles. He emphasizes a shift from basic coding to system architecture and problem-solving. Despite recent layoffs, Amazon's demand for developers is accelerating, with plans to hire thousands of interns and entry-level engineers globally, focusing on new skillsets for next-gen systems.

title: Former Twitter CEO launches Index to compensate creators in AI agent era
content: Former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal's new platform, Index, aims to fairly compensate content creators as AI agents increasingly consume online material. This innovative system, developed by Parallel Web systems, uses a game theory concept to value each source's contribution to AI output, offering a dynamic alternative to fixed licensing deals.

title: Prince Yadav’s India call-up: A father who wanted stability, a son who chased cricket
content: Prince Yadav’s maiden India ODI call-up caps a remarkable rise in Indian cricket. From playing tennis-ball cricket in Najafgarh he has taken the long route to the national side. Spotted by coach Amit Vashishtha because of his yorkers and backed despite multiple setbacks, including a two-year ban for age fudging, Prince has now earned a place in India’s squad for the ODI series against Afghanistan.

title: Fact check: Was Aaron Rodgers seen with wife after Steelers contract?
content: Aaron Rodgers, the NFL veteran, recently signed a one year deal with the Pittsburgh Steelers, as retirement rumors dominated the headlines, sparking chaos among millions of fans. Amid all the speculations, the spotlight remains on Aaron Rodgers’ wife even as he continues to maintain privacy about his marital life. Through all of this, a picture of Aaron Rodgers with a woman has convinced millions that the identity of his wife has finally been revealed.

title: Ronda Rousey’s net worth 2026: Earnings, endorsements and lifestyle
content: Ronda Rousey, a trailblazer in combat sports, is projected to have a net worth of nearly $14 million by 2026. Her fortune stems from lucrative UFC and WWE careers, acting, endorsements, and book sales. Rousey's impact on women's MMA and her transition to WWE cemented her status as a crossover star, ensuring her continued relevance and earning potential.

title: Oilers linked to Alex Tuch amid NHL free agency contract rumors
content: NHL trade rumors are heating up as free agency approaches, and Alex Tuch of the Buffalo Sabres is reportedly in the Edmonton Oilers’ crosshairs. Recent rumors suggest Tuch’s contract value is taking a hit due to his inconsistent play in the playoffs. It’s an opportunity for Edmonton, who are searching for top-six scoring depth and tight salary cap restrictions and roster restructuring needs.

title: World’s hottest city is in UP: What’s making Banda so unbearably hot?
content: Banda, a district in Uttar Pradesh's Bundelkhand region, has repeatedly recorded the world's highest temperatures, becoming a man-made heat island. Experts attribute this to barren terrain, vanishing green cover, relentless sand mining, and drying rivers, creating a vicious cycle of extreme heat.  This situation is exacerbated by dry westerly winds and a lack of adequate winter rainfall.

title: Goenka chats with Sooryavanshi; Gavaskar teases: ‘I’ll be bidding for you soon’
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's explosive 93 off 38 balls stunned Lucknow Super Giants, leading Rajasthan Royals to a dominant seven-wicket victory.  Even rival owner Sanjiv Goenka applauded the young prodigy's breathtaking innings, which effectively sealed the match and moved Rajasthan closer to the playoffs. Sooryavanshi's remarkable knock, featuring rapid scoring bursts, showcased a maturity beyond his years.

title: IPL 2026 playoff race: What RR, PBKS, CSK, DC and KKR need to do to grab the final spot
content: The IPL playoff race intensifies with three spots taken. Rajasthan Royals are in pole position for the final berth, needing just one win. Punjab Kings, Chennai Super Kings, Delhi Capitals, and Kolkata Knight Riders face tougher paths, requiring victories and favourable results from other matches to advance. Net run rate could prove crucial for several contenders.

title: IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi leapfrogs 7 players to reclaim Orange Cap
content: Teen sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has reclaimed the IPL 2026 Orange Cap with a blistering 93 against LSG. The 15-year-old now leads the tournament with 579 runs, maintaining an explosive strike rate of 236.32. Sooryavanshi also became the first Indian to hit 50 sixes in a single IPL season.

title: 'Melodi' moment in Rome: Meloni welcomes 'friend' PM Modi with selfie and a warm message
content: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni welcomed Narendra Modi to Rome for discussions aimed at elevating bilateral ties to a special strategic partnership. The visit focuses on strengthening cooperation, particularly through the India-Middle East-Europe Economic Corridor (IMEC), and includes plans for annual summits and a trade target of 20 billion euros by 2029.

title: Meghan Markle's anniversary post revives royal drama
content: Meghan Markle marked her wedding anniversary with a series of personal snapshots, inadvertently reopening old wounds. The conspicuous absence of royal family members on this occasion led to a flurry of online chatter, reigniting conversations about past grievances related to the wedding preparations, including the bridesmaid dresses and tiaras mentioned in Harry's memoir 'Spare'.

title: Fitness centres or conversion traps? UP police expose ‘gym jihad’ modus operandi
content: Uttar Pradesh police have invoked the stringent Gangsters Act against ten gym owners in Mirzapur. Accused of running a racket, they allegedly forced women into religious conversion and sexual exploitation.  Investigators believe over fifty women were targeted.  Properties acquired through illicit means are slated for confiscation.

title: IPL Playoffs: With 6 matches to go, RR surge to 68.8% as race narrows for final spot
content: With six games left, LSG and MI are out, while RCB, GT, and SRH have qualified for IPL 2026 playoffs. RR are best positioned among the remaining contenders, followed by PBKS. KKR, DC, and CSK have slim playoff hopes, with various tie scenarios influencing their chances for the final spots.

title: CHSE Odisha Plus 2 result 2026 to be declared today: Here's how to check marksheet
content: The Council of Higher Secondary Education Odisha will announce the AHSE 2026 Class 12 results today, May 20, between 12:30 pm and 1 pm. Results for Arts, Science, Commerce and Vocational streams will be declared together this year. Students can check provisional marksheets on results.odisha.gov.in, chseodisha.nic.in, orissaresults.nic.in and DigiLocker using roll number and registration details. Over four lakh students appeared for the examinations conducted between February 18 and March 25, 2026.

title: Who was Inder Kaur? Everything to know about Punjabi singer found dead in Ludhiana
content: Tragedy struck the Punjabi music scene as singer Yashinder Kaur's body was found in the Neelo canal, a week after her alleged abduction. Her family claims she was murdered due to a rejected marriage proposal from a Moga-based man. Kaur, a popular singer and makeup artist, had a significant social media following. Police are investigating the incident. Read on to know more in deail.

title: Virat Kohli rejects workload management: ‘You’ll never reach your full potential’
content: Virat Kohli revealed how Rahul Dravid and Vikram Rathour's support helped him overcome a challenging century drought and rediscover his love for batting. He also shared his perspective on workload management, emphasising the importance of understanding one's limits before tapering. Kohli stressed that true drive stems from a desire for long-term respect, not just T20 riches.

title: Karnataka woman dies by suicide over dowry harassment by husband, in-laws
content: A 24-year-old woman, Aishwarya, died by suicide in Ballari, Karnataka, allegedly due to mental harassment and dowry torture from her husband and in-laws. Found hanging at her parents' home, her alleged death note points to abuse. Police have arrested her husband, a veterinarian, and are investigating the case under relevant sections of the law.

title: Meta Orders Work From Home First, Then Lays Off 8,000 Employees At 4 AM
content: Meta confirmed layoffs last month. Inside the company, morale dipped sharply. Some staffers 'began collecting free snacks and spare laptop chargers'.

title: Who Is Mahmoud Ahmadinejad, Trump's 1st Choice For Iran's New Leader
content: Many who remembered Ahmadinejad's term in office from 2005 to 2013 recall him as a Holocaust denier, an atom-bomb fanatic, and someone who shoved Islamic revolutionary ideology down the throats of a country already weary of it.

title: The Future Of Crypto In India: Regulation, Taxation, And What Lies Ahead
content: Despite a 30 per cent tax on gains and 1 per cent TDS on every trade, millions of Indians continue to buy, hold, and build in crypto.

title: Called "Good For Nothing" By Teachers, Bihar Student Kills Self In Bengaluru
content: Chunnu, 23, was allegedly insulted publicly in classrooms, called "good for nothing," burdened with excessive project, and mentally tortured by the faculty.

title: WHO Raises Alarm Over Speed Of Ebola Outbreak As Congo Announces 134 Deaths
content: The virus spread undetected for weeks after the first known death as authorities tested for a more common type of Ebola and came up negative, health experts and aid workers said.

title: "BJP Will Be Removed From Centre In Coming Days": Mamata Banerjee
content: Mamata Banerjee has boldly claimed that the BJP-led Central government will be "removed from power" in future

title: US Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Says He Was Just '60 Minutes' Away From Relaunching Iran Attacks
content: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

title: Iran Warns US Of "Many More Surprises" After Trump Threatens New Strikes
content: Araghchi said that Iranian forces are confirmed to be the first to down an American F-35 fighter jet, citing a US congressional report on aircraft combat losses.

title: Case Against Hyderabad Engineer, Assets May Be Worth Over Rs 100 Crore
content: Telangana Anti-Corruption Bureau registers case against Hyderabad engineer for disproportionate assets worth crores.

title: Oil Prices Ease After Trump Says US Will End Iran War 'Very Quickly'
content: Trump's comments on the need to strike again came a day after he said he had paused a planned resumption of hostilities.

title: Pics: PM Modi's Dinner, Drive, Colosseum Diplomacy With Meloni In Rome
content: The picture shows the Colosseum, originally known as the Flavian Amphitheatre, a massive stone oval in the center of Rome illuminated in the background.

title: Taiwan Travelogue, A Historical Romance, Wins International Booker Prize
content: Yang, who writes fiction, essays, manga and video game scripts, has said she "wanted to untangle the complex circumstances" of Taiwan's time as a Japanese colony.

title: "We Were All Set": Trump Says US Was "An Hour Away" From New Strikes On Iran
content: The comment follows Trump's recent statement on Sunday that "the clock is ticking" for Iran to accept a peace deal with the United States and "there won't be anything left of them" if Tehran's leaders don't "get moving, FAST".

title: Indian Diplomat Found Dead Near Bathroom Inside Mission In Bangladesh
content: The body was subsequently sent to the morgue at Chittagong Medical College Hospital for autopsy. The exact reason behind his death is not clear yet.

title: Rajasthan Court Says 'Aata-Sata' Marriage System Is "Morally Bankrupt"
content: The Aata-Sata, or "give and take" marriage, is an age-old custom practised in Rajasthan where two families exchange their daughters, including minors, for marriage.

title: Iran Stages Mass Weddings For Couples Ready For War "Sacrifice"
content: Iranian authorities say millions of people, including top figures such as speaker of parliament Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and President Masoud Pezeshkian, have put their names forward.

title: Italy & India: A strategic partnership for Indo-Mediterranean
content: the relationship between India and Italy has now reached a decisive stage . our ties have expanded with unprecedented momentum, evolving from a cordial friendship into a special strategic partnership grounded in the values of freedom and democracy . the partnership is guided by regular exchanges at higher political and institutional levels, and is gaining a new and higher dimension .

title: 136 dead, no vaccine or cure: WHO warns over 'scale and speed' of Ebola outbreak
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock.
